summary: Frontend testing of FoundationSection.jsx scroll-animation component. All 7 specified test criteria passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Two 404 errors in console (likely for favicon/manifest assets) — not related to FoundationSection

Heading opacity is already 1 when section is scrolled into view via scrollIntoView() — this is expected behavior as the Framer Motion useScroll animations are positional; when section is in viewport, animations have progressed past opacity:0 threshold
context_for_next_testing_agent: FoundationSection renders at ~1000px from top. philosophy-section data-testid present. 3 images (banner, circle, square) in desktop layout. Content card with heading 'Leadership Is Not a Strategy. It Is a State of Being.' Mobile fallback (.md:hidden) renders correctly with heading visible. No framer-motion console errors. Previous iterations 2-5 all 100% pass.

test_results.Content card heading from t.home.philoso: PASS - 'Leadership Is Not a Strategy. It Is a State of Being.'
